using these email run the ORDER flow and create log file <mail-id>.log and store the output in the following format:
append the file with the new Phase 2 output. If phase 2 is present replace it.
do not modify the phase 1

Phase 2 success criteria for ORDER flow review:
- Include the order identifier when present in the source email.
- Include the confirmation or status context when present in the source email.
- Include the primary item line, quantity, total, and main order-action link when present.
- Treat outputs missing both the order identifier and status context as incomplete.
- Refresh only the `Phase 2 output:` blocks when rerunning the sample list.

Phase 3 routing review:
- Resolve one canonical `profile_id` for each usable Phase 2 result.
- Preserve fallback candidates when multiple deterministic profiles remain plausible.
- Downgrade confidence when strong profile signals conflict.
- Fail safely when Phase 2 did not produce usable scrubbed output.

font-family:Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;font-size:26px;line-height:36px;\"><b>Your Upcoming Commuter Benefits Order</b></span></p></td></tr></table></td></tr><tr><td bgcolor=\"#FFFFFF\" style=\"padding: 20px 40px; background: #ffffff;\" valign=\"top\"><table cellpadding=\"0\" cellspacing=\"0\" style=\"background: #FFFFFF;\"><tr><td><p style=\"text-align: left;margin-bottom:20px;\">Dear Slobodan,</p><p class=\"text-build-content\" style=\"line-height: 26px; margin: 10px 0;\"><span style=\"font-family:Arial;font-size:16px;line-height:26px;\">This is a reminder that you have a pending May 2026 Transit order. You will have until April 10, 2026 to make any changes. Any changes made after April 10, 2026 will apply to the June 2026 benefit month.</span></p><p><strong>Note:</strong> If you are ordering a Long Island Railroad or Metro North Railroad product, the last date you can change your order is the 4th of the month.</p><p class=\"text-build-content\" style=\"line-height: 26px; margin: 10px 0; text-align: center;\"><span style=\"font-family:Arial;font-size:16px;line-height:26px; text-align: center;\">May 2026's Transit Pending Order Details</span></p><table width=\"100%\" border=\"0\" cellspacing=\"0\" cellpadding=\"0\" style=\"background: #FFFFFF;\">\n<tr><td style=\"text-align: left; font-size: 16px;\">Product</td><td style=\"text-align: center; font-size: 16px;\">Qty</td><td style=\"text-align: right; font-size: 16px;\">Price</td></tr><tr><td colspan=\"3\"><hr style=\"background: #cccccc; height: 1;\" /></td></tr><tr><td style=\"text-align: left;\"><b style=\"font-size: 13px\">Commuter Benefits  Prepaid Mastercard&reg;</b><br />Commuter Benefits Prepaid Mastercard&reg;</td><td style=\"text-align: center\">1</td><td style=\"text-align: right\">$20.00</td></tr><tr><td colspan=\"3\"><hr style=\"background: #cccccc; height: 1;\" /></td></tr><tr><td colspan=\"2\" style=\"text-align: right\">Estimated Subsidy Amount:</td><td style=\"text-align: right\">($10.00)</td></tr>\n<tr><td colspan=\"3\"><hr style=\"background: #cccccc; height: 1;\" /></td></tr><tr><td colspan=\"2\" style=\"text-align: right\"><b>Total Estimated Cost:</b></td><td style=\"text-align: right\">$10.00</td></tr>\n<tr><td colspan=\"3\"><hr style=\"background: #cccccc; height: 1;\" /></td></tr></table>\n</td></tr></table></td></tr><tr><td /></tr><tr><td bgcolor=\"#FFFFFF\" style=\"padding: 0px 40px; background: #ffffff;\" valign=\"top\"><p class=\"text-build-content\" style=\"line-height: 26px; margin: 10px 0;\"><span style=\"font-family:Arial;font-size:16px;line-height:26px;\">For more details on your pending order, or to make changes, visit your commuter benefits portal.</span></p><p class=\"text-build-content\" style=\"line-height: 26px; margin-top: 15px;\"><span style=\"font-family:Arial;font-size:16px;line-height:26px;\">Thank you,</span><br /><span style=\"font-family:Arial;font-size:16px;line-height:26px;\">Customer Support</span><br /><span style=\"font-family:Arial;font-size:16px;line-height:26px;\">Commuter Benefits</span><br /><span style=\"font-family:Arial;font-size:16px;line-height:26px;\">866-808-5214</span><br /><br /><span style=\"font-family:Arial;font-size:10px;line-height:15px;\">The Commuter Benefits Prepaid Mastercard is issued by The Bancorp Bank, N.A., pursuant to license by Mastercard International Incorporated and may not be used everywhere Debit Mastercard is accepted. The Bancorp Bank, N.A.; Member FDIC. Mastercard and the circles design are registered trademarks of Mastercard International Incorporated.</span><br /></p></td></tr><tr><td align=\"center\" valign=\"top\" style=\"background-color:#ffffff\"><table cellpadding=\"0\" cellspacing=\"0\" align=\"center\" style=\"width: 100%; margin:0 0\"><tr><td align=\"center\"><img alt=\"companylogo\" src=\"https://edenredbenefits.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/FooterRibbonTPA.png\" style=\"padding: 0; border: 0; margin-top:10px\" width=\"100%\" class=\"img_scale\" /></td></tr></table></td></tr><tr><td><p style=\"text-align: center; margin-top:20px; margin-bottom:10px\"><span style=\"font-size:13px;text-align:center;color:#55575d;font-family:Arial;line-height:22px; \">\n                                        This message is intended for Slobodan Hajduk, sent by Edenred Benefits, LLC 265 Winter Street, 3rd Floor, Waltham, MA 02451.\n                                        </span></p></td></tr></table></td></tr></table><br/><a style=\"font-family: Arial, sans-serif;\" href=\"http://1vv8.mj.am/lnk/AUsAAJQcXRYAAAAAAAAAAMpAhq4AAYC7prEAAAAAAAHgGwBpz2PeZ4gxItieQTGnr6Xbv0e7FQABy7Y/0/H6seyMyjaR6oIj0bsSHWnA/aHR0cDovLzF2djgubWouYW0v?b=1\">&#8203;</a><a style=\"text-decoration: none; display: inline-block;\" href=\"http://1vv8.mj.am/lnk/AUsAAJQcXRYAAAAAAAAAAMpAhq4AAYC7prEAAAAAAAHgGwBpz2PeZ4gxItieQTGnr6Xbv0e7FQABy7Y/0/H6seyMyjaR6oIj0bsSHWnA/aHR0cDovLzF2djgubWouYW0v?b=3\">\n<img src=\"http://1vv8.mj.am/oo/AUsAAJQcXRYAAAAAAAAAAMpAhq4AAYC7prEAAAAAAAHgGwBpz2PeZ4gxItieQTGnr6Xbv0e7FQABy7Y/e508b82a/e.gif\" height=\"1\" width=\"1\" alt=\"\" border=\"0\" style=\"height:1px;width:1px;border:0;\"/>\n</a></body></html>",

    "scrubbed_text": "May 2026's Transit Pending Order Details\nYour Upcoming Commuter Benefits Order\nDear Slobodan,\nThis is a reminder that you have a pending May 2026 Transit order.                                                              <tr style=\"font-size: 12px; color: #1C1D1F; line-height: 18px;\">\r\n                                                                    <td>\r\n                                                                        \r\n                                                                        <h3 style=\"margin: 0px;\">Timed Entry</h3>\r\n                                                                        <table\r\n                                                                                border=\"0\"\r\n                                                                                cellpadding=\"0\"\r\n                                                                                cellspacing=\"0\"\r\n                                                                                role=\"presentation\"\r\n                                                                                style=\"width: 100%;\"\r\n                                                                        >\r\n                                                                            <tbody>\r\n                                                                            <tr>\r\n                                                                                <td style=\"width: 100%;\">\r\n                                                                                    <div style=\"height: 16px; line-height: 16px; font-size: 1px;\">\r\n                                                                                        &nbsp;\r\n                                                                                    </div>\r\n                                                                                </td>\r\n                                            </table>\r\n                                                                        <ul style=\"padding-left: 14px; margin: 0px;\">\r\n                                                                            <li style=\"margin-left: 0px;\"><p>This timed entry reservation is valid for the day and entry time indicated on the ticket, with an allowance for a 30-minute early arrival. Once entered, visitors can stay the entire duration of the day that the Scenic Drive is open to the public. Reservations are required October 1 to May 31, 8 am- 5 pm. </p>\r\n<p>Re-entry into the Scenic Drive after your one-hour entry reservation will require a new reservation. </p>\r\n\r\n                                                                            </li>\r\n                                                                        </ul>\r\n                                                                        <table\r\n                                                                                border=\"0\"\r\n                                                                                cellpadding=\"0\"\r\n                                                                                cellspacing=\"0\"\r\n                                                                                role=\"presentation\"\r\n                                                                                style=\"width: 100%;\"\r\n                                                                        >\r\n                                                                            <tbody>\r\n                                                                            <tr>\r\n                                                                                <td style=\"width: 100%;\">\r\n                                                                                    <div style=\"height: 16px; line-height: 16px; font-size: 1px;\">\r\n                                                                                        &nbsp;\r\n                                                                                    </div>\r\n                                                                                </td>\r\n                                                                            </tr>\r\n                                                                            </tbody>\r\n                                                                        </table>\r\n                                                                        \r\n                                                                        <h3 style=\"margin: 0px;\">Entering the Conservation Area</h3>\r\n                                                                        <table\r\n                                                                                border=\"0\"\r\n                                                                                cellpadding=\"0\"\r\n                                                                                cellspacing=\"0\"\r\n                                                                                role=\"presentation\"\r\n                                                                                style=\"width: 100%;\"\r\n                                                                        >\r\n                                                                            <tbody>\r\n                                                                            <tr>\r\n                                                                                <td style=\"width: 100%;\">\r\n                                                                                    <div style=\"height: 16px; line-height: 16px; font-size: 1px;\">\r\n                                                                                        &nbsp;\r\n                                                                                    </div>\r\n                                                                                </td>\r\n                                                                            </tr>\r\n                                                                            </tbody>\r\n                                                                        </table>\r\n                                                                        <ul style=\"padding-left: 14px; margin: 0px;\">\r\n                                                                            <li style=\"margin-left: 0px;\"><p>Please have a printed or digital copy of your reservation ticket available to be scanned BEFORE arriving at the entrance station. Current Pass holders must provide Pass for validation.</p>\r\n\r\n                                                                            </li>\r\n                                                                        </ul>\r\n                                                                        <table\r\n                                                                                border=\"0\"\r\n                                                                                cellpadding=\"0\"\r\n                                                                                cellspacing=\"0\"\r\n                                                                                role=\"presentation\"\r\n                                                                                style=\"width: 100%;\"\r\n                                                                        >\r\n                                                                            <tbody>\r\n                                                                            <tr>\r\n                                                                                <td style=\"width: 100%;\">\r\n                                                                                    <div style=\"height: 16px; line-height: 16px; font-size: 1px;\">\r\n                                                                                        &nbsp;\r\n                                                                                    </div>\r\n                                                                                </td>\r\n                                                                            </tr>\r\n                                                                            </tbody>\r\n                                                                        </table>\r\n                                                                        \r\n                                                                        <h3 style=\"margin: 0px;\">Hours of Operations</h3>\r\n                                                                        <table\r\n                                                                                border=\"0\"\r\n                                                                                cellpadding=\"0\"\r\n                                                                                cellspacing=\"0\"\r\n                                                                                role=\"presentation\"\r\n                                                                                style=\"width: 100%;\"\r\n                                                                        >\r\n                                                                            <tbody>\r\n                                                                            <tr>\r\n                                                                                <td style=\"width: 100%;\">\r\n                                                                                    <div style=\"height: 16px; margin: 0px;\">\r\n                                                                            <li style=\"margin-left: 0px;\"><p>October: 6 am to 7 pm PST | November – February: 6 am to 5 pm PST | March: 6 am to 7 pm PST | April- September: 6 am to 8 pm PST</p>\r\n\r\n                                                                            </li>\r\n                                                                        </ul>\r\n                                                                        <table\r\n                                                                                border=\"0\"\r\n                                                                                cellpadding=\"0\"\r\n                                                                                cellspacing=\"0\"\r\n                                                                                role=\"presentation\"\r\n                                                                                style=\"width: 100%;\"\r\n                                                                        >\r\n                                                                            <tbody>\r\n                                                                            <tr>\r\n                                                                                <td style=\"width: 100%;\">\r\n                                                                                    <div style=\"height: 16px; line-height: 16px; font-size: 1px;\">\r\n                                                                                        &nbsp;\r\n                                                                                    </div>\r\n                                                                                </td>\r\n                                                                            </tr>\r\n                                                                            </tbody>\r\n                                                                        </table>\r\n                                                                        \r\n                                                                        <h3 style=\"margin: 0px;\">Fee Free Day Tickets</h3>\r\n                                                                        <table\r\n                                                                                border=\"0\"\r\n                                                                                cellpadding=\"0\"\r\n                                                                                cellspacing=\"0\"\r\n                                                                                role=\"presentation\"\r\n                                                                                style=\"width: 100%;\"\r\n                                                                        >\r\n                                                                            <tbody>\r\n                                                                            <tr>\r\n                                                                                <td style=\"width: 100%;\">\r\n                                                                                    <div style=\"height: 16px; line-height: 16px; font-size: 1px;\">\r\n                                                                                        &nbsp;\r\n                                                                                    </div>\r\n                                                                                </td>\r\n                                                                            </tr>\r\n                                                                            </tbody>\r\n                                                                        </table>\r\n                                                                        <ul style=\"padding-left: 14px; margin: 0px;\">\r\n                                                                            <li style=\"margin-left: 0px;\"><p>Red Rock Canyon National Conservation Area participates in entrance fee-free days. On these significant days of celebration or commemoration, all entrance fees are waived. To reserve a ticket for a Fee Free day, select <a href=\"https://www.recreation.gov/timed-entry/10075177/ticket/10075181\" rel=\"nofollow\">Scenic Drive 1-Day Personal Vehicle <strong>Fee Free Day</strong></a> or <a href=\"https://www.recreation.gov/timed-entry/10075177/ticket/10075182\" rel=\"nofollow\">Scenic Drive 1-Day RV/Trailer <strong>Fee Free Entry</strong></a><strong>.</strong>  Fee Free days are as follows:  </p>\r\n<p><strong>2022 Fee Free Days</strong></p>\r\n<ul>\r\n<li>November 11 (Veterans Day) </li>\r\n</ul>\r\n<p><strong>2023 Fee Free Days</strong></p>\r\n<ul>\r\n<li>January 16 (Martin Luther King Jr. Day)</li>\r\n<li>February 20 (Presidents Day)</li>\r\n<li>June 10 (National Get Outdoors Day)</li>\r\n<li>August 4 (Great American Outdoors Day)</li>\r\n<li>September 30 (National Public Lands Day)</li>\r\n<li>November 11 (Veterans Day)</li>\r\n</ul>\r\n\r\n                                                                            </li>\r\n                                                                        </ul>\r\n                                                                        <table\r\n <tr>\r\n                                                                    <td style=\"color: #1C1D1F; font-size: 12px; line-height: 18px;\">\r\n                                                                        <p>Red Rock Canyon is located 17 miles west of the Las Vegas Strip on Charleston Boulevard/State Route 159.  The Scenic Drive and Visitor Center is located 5 miles east of the Conservation Area Boundary. The Visitor Center is located at 1000 Scenic Loop Drive and can be used for map apps that will take you to the Visitor Center near the beginning of the Scenic Drive.</p>\r\n\r\n                                                                    </td>\r\n                                                                </tr>\r\n                                                                </tbody>\r\n                                                            </table>\r\n                                                        </td>\r\n                                                    </tr>\r\n                                                    </tbody>\r\n                                                </table>\r\n                                            </td>\r\n                                        </tr>\r\n                                        </tbody>\r\n                                    </table>\r\n                                </td>\r\n                            </tr>\r\n                            </tbody>\r\n                        </table>\r\n                        <table\r\n                                border=\"0\"\r\n                                cellpadding=\"0\"\r\n                                cellspacing=\"0\"\r\n                                role=\"presentation\"\r\n                                style=\"width: 100%;\"\r\n                        >\r\n                            <tbody>\r\n                            <tr>\r\n                                <td style=\"width: 100%;\">\r\n                                    <div style=\"height: 24px;                                                \n                                                                        <h3 style=\"margin: 0px;\">Timed Entry</h3>\n                                                                        <table\n                                                                                border=\"0\"\n                                                                                cellpadding=\"0\"\n                                                                                cellspacing=\"0\"\n                                                                                role=\"presentation\"\n                                                                                style=\"width: 100%;\"\n                                                                        >\n                                                                            <tbody>\n                                                                            <tr>\n                                                                                <td style=\"width: 100%;\">\n                                                                                    <div style=\"height: 16px; line-height: 16px; font-size: 1px;\">\n                                                                                        &nbsp;\n                                                                                    </div>\n                                                                                </td>\n                                                                            </tr>\n                                                                            </tbody>\n                                                                        </table>\n                                                                        <ul style=\"padding-left: 14px; margin: 0px;\">\n                                                                            <li style=\"margin-left: 0px;\"><p>This timed entry reservation is valid for the day and entry time indicated on the ticket, with an allowance for a 30-minute early arrival. Once entered, visitors can stay the entire duration of the day that the Scenic Drive is open to the public. Reservations are required October 1 to May 31, 8 am- 5 pm. </p>\n<p>Re-entry into the Scenic Drive after your one-hour entry reservation will require a new reservation. </p>\n\n                                                                            </li>\n                                                                        </ul>\n                                                                        <table\n                                                                                border=\"0\"\n                                                                                cellpadding=\"0\"\n                                                                                cellspacing=\"0\"\n                                                                                role=\"presentation\"\n                                                                                style=\"width: 100%;\"\n                                                                        >\n                                                                            <tbody>\n                                                                            <tr>\n                                                                                <td style=\"width: 100%;\">\n                                                                                    <div style=\"height: 16px; line-height: 16px; font-size: 1px;\">\n                                                                                        &nbsp;\n                                                                                    </div>\n                                                                                </td>\n                                                                            </tr>\n                                                                            </tbody>\n                                                                        </table>\n                                                                        \n                                                                        <h3 style=\"margin: 0px;\">Entering the Conservation Area</h3>\n                                                                        <table\n                                                                                border=\"0\"\n                                                                                cellpadding=\"0\"\n                                                                                cellspacing=\"0\"\n                                                                                role=\"presentation\"\n                                                                                style=\"width: 100%;\"\n                                                                        >\n                                                                            <tbody>\n                                                                            <tr>\n                                                                                <td style=\"width: 100%;\">\n                                                                                    <div style=\"height: 16px; line-height: 16px; font-size: 1px;\">\n                                                                                        &nbsp;\n                                                                                    </div>\n                                                                                </td>\n                                                                            </tr>\n                                                                            </tbody>\n                                                                        </table>\n                                                                        <ul style=\"padding-left: 14px; margin: 0px;\">\n                                                                            <li style=\"margin-left: 0px;\"><p>Please have a printed or digital copy of your reservation ticket available to be scanned BEFORE arriving at the entrance station. Current Pass holders must provide Pass for validation.</p>\n\n                                                                            </li>\n                                                                        </ul>\n                                                                        <table\n                                                                                border=\"0\"\n                                                                                cellpadding=\"0\"\n                                                                                cellspacing=\"0\"\n                                                                                role=\"presentation\"\n                                                                                style=\"width: 100%;\"\n                                                                        >\n                                                                            <tbody>\n                                                                            <tr>\n                                                                                <td style=\"width: 100%;\">\n                                                                                    <div style=\"height: 16px; line-height: 16px; font-size: 1px;\">\n                                                                                        &nbsp;\n                                                                                    </div>\n                                                                                </td>\n                                                                            </tr>\n                                                                            </tbody>\n                                                                        </table>\n                                                                        \n                                                                        <h3 style=\"margin: 0px;\">Hours of Operations</h3>\n                                                                        <table\n                                                                                border=\"0\"\n                                                                                cellpadding=\"0\"\n                                                                                cellspacing=\"0\"\n                                                                                role=\"presentation\"\n                                                                                style=\"width: 100%;\"\n                                                                        >\n                                                                            <tbody>\n                                                                            <tr>\n                                                                                <td style=\"width: 100%;\">\n                                                                                    <div style=\"height: 16px; line-height: 16px; font-size: 1px;\">\n                                                                                        &nbsp;\n                                                                                    </div>\n                                                                                </td>\n                                                                            </tr>\n                                                                            </tbody>\n                                                                        </table>\n                                                                        <ul style=\"padding-left: 14px; margin: 0px;\">\n                                                                            <li style=\"margin-left: 0px;\"><p>October: 6 am to 7 pm PST | November  February: 6 am to 5 pm PST | March: 6 am to 7 pm PST | April- September: 6 am to 8 pm PST</p>\n\n                                                                            </li>\n                                                                        </ul>\n                                                                        <table\n                                                                                border=\"0\"\n                                                                                cellpadding=\"0\"\n                                                                                cellspacing=\"0\"\n                                                                                role=\"presentation\"\n                                                                                style=\"width: 100%;\"\n                                                                        >\n                                                                            <tbody>\n                                                                            <tr>\n                                                                                <td style=\"width: 100%;\">\n                                                                                    <div style=\"height: 16px; line-height: 16px; font-size: 1px;\">\n                                                                                        &nbsp;\n                                                                                    </div>\n                                                                                </td>\n                                                                            </tr>\n                                                                            </tbody>\n                                                                        </table>\n                                                                        \n                                                                        <h3 style=\"margin: 0px;\">Fee Free Day Tickets</h3>\n                                                                        <table\n                                                                                border=\"0\"\n                                                                                cellpadding=\"0\"\n                                                                                cellspacing=\"0\"\n                                                                                role=\"presentation\"\n                                                                                style=\"width: 100%;\"\n                                                                        >\n                                                                            <tbody>\n                                                                            <tr>\n                                                                                <td style=\"width: 100%;\">\n                                                                                    <div style=\"height: 16px; line-height: 16px; font-size: 1px;\">\n                                                                                        &nbsp;\n                                                                                    </div>\n                                                                                </td>\n                                                                            </tr>\n                                                                            </tbody>\n                                                                        </table>\n                                                                        <ul style=\"padding-left: 14px; margin: 0px;\">\n                                                                            <li style=\"margin-left: 0px;\"><p>Red Rock Canyon National Conservation Area participates in entrance fee-free days. On these significant days of celebration or commemoration, all entrance fees are waived. To reserve a ticket for a Fee Free day, select <a href=\"https://www.recreation.gov/timed-entry/10075177/ticket/10075181\" rel=\"nofollow\">Scenic Drive 1-Day Personal Vehicle <strong>Fee Free Day</strong></a> or <a href=\"https://www.recreation.gov/timed-entry/10075177/ticket/10075182\" rel=\"nofollow\">Scenic Drive 1-Day RV/Trailer <strong>Fee Free Entry</strong></a><strong>.</strong>  Fee Free days are as follows:  </p>\n<p><strong>2022 Fee Free Days</strong></p>\n<ul>\n<li>November 11 (Veterans Day) </li>\n</ul>\n<p><strong>2023 Fee Free Days</strong></p>\n<ul>\n<li>January 16 (Martin Luther King Jr. Day)</li>\n<li>February 20 (Presidents Day)</li>\n<li>June 10 (National Get Outdoors Day)</li>\n<li>August 4 (Great American Outdoors Day)</li>\n<li>September 30 (National Public Lands Day)</li>\n<li>November 11 (Veterans Day)</li>\n</ul>\n\n                                                                            </li>\n                                                                        </ul>\n                                                                        <table\n                                                                                border=\"0\"\n                                                                                cellpadding=\"0\"\n             <table\n                                                                                border=\"0\"\n                 </td>\n                                                                </tr>\n                                                                <tr>\n                                                                    <td style=\"color: #1C1D1F; font-size: 12px; line-height: 18px;\">\n                                                                        <p>Red Rock Canyon is located 17 miles west of the Las Vegas Strip on Charleston Boulevard/State Route 159.  The Scenic Drive and Visitor Center is located 5 miles east of the Conservation Area Boundary. The Visitor Center is located at 1000 Scenic Loop Drive and can be used for map apps that will take you to the Visitor Center near the beginning of the Scenic Drive.</p>\n\n                                                                    </td>\n                                                                </tr>\n                                                                </tbody>\n                                                            </table>\n                                                        </td>\n                                                    </tr>\n                                                    </tbody>\n                                                </table>\n                                            </td>\n                                        </tr>\n                                        </tbody>\n                                    </table>\n                                </td>\n                            </tr>\n                            </tbody>\n                        </table>\n                        <table\n                                border=\"0\"\n                                cellpadding=\"0\"\n                                cellspacing=\"0\"\n                                role=\"presentation\"\n                                style=\"width: 100%;\"\n                        >\n                            <tbody>\n                            <tr>\n                                <td style=\"width: 100%;\">\n                                    <div style=\"height: 24px; color: #1C1D1F;\"\n                >\n                    <td>\n                        <table\n                                align=\"center\"\n                                border=\"0\"\n                                cellpadding=\"0\"\n                                cellspacing=\"0\"\n                                class=\"row-content\"\n                                width=\"848\"\n                        >\n                            <tbody>\n                            <tr>\n                                <td style=\"padding: 24px 16px; text-align: left;\">\n                                    <h3 style=\"margin: 0px; font-size: 18px; line-height: 24px;\">Help &amp; Support</h3>\n                                    <table\n                                            border=\"0\"\n                                            cellpadding=\"0\"\n                                            cellspacing=\"0\"\n                                            role=\"presentation\"\n                                            style=\"width: 100%;\"\n                                    >\n                                        <tbody>\n                                        <tr>\n                                            <td style=\"width: 100%;\">\n                                                <div style=\"height: 8px; line-height: 8px; font-size: 1px;\">&nbsp;</div>\n                                            </td>\n                                        </tr>\n                                        </tbody>\n                                    </table>\n                                    <p style=\"margin: 0px; font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px;\">Have a question - were\n                                        here to\n                                        help! For information about your account, reservations, trip planner, and more,\n                                        the best\n                                        place to start is our <a\n                                                href=\"https://recreationonestopprod.servicenowservices.com/external\"\n                                                target=\"_blank\"\n                                        >Help Center</a>. If you need additional support, you can submit an email, chat\n                                        with a\n                                        representative, or find other contact options on our <a\n                                                href=\"https://www.recreation.gov/contact-us\"\n                                                target=\"_blank\"\n                                        >Contact Us</a> page.</p>\n                                </td>\n                            </tr>\n                            </tbody>\n                        </table>\n                    </td>\n                </tr>\n            </table>\n            <table\n                    align=\"center\"\n                    border=\"0\"\n                    cellpadding=\"0\"\n                    cellspacing=\"0\"\n                    bgcolor=\"#162935\"\n                    width=\"100%\"\n                    style=\"background-image: linear-gradient(#162935, #162935);\"\n            >\n                <tbody>\n                <tr style=\"font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;, &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;\">\n                    <td bgcolor=\"#162935\" style=\"background-image: linear-gradient(#162935, #162935);\">\n                        <table\n                                align=\"center\"\n                                border=\"0\"\n                                cellpadding=\"0\"\n                                cellspacing=\"0\"\n                                class=\"row-content\"\n                                width=\"848\"\n                        >\n                            <tbody>\n                            <tr>\n                                <td style=\"padding: 24px 16px;                                                \n                                                                        <h3 style=\"margin: 0px;\">Timed Entry</h3>\n                                                                        <table\n                                                                                border=\"0\"\n                                                                                cellpadding=\"0\"\n                                                                                cellspacing=\"0\"\n                                                                                role=\"presentation\"\n                                                                                style=\"width: 100%;\"\n                                                                        >\n                                                                            <tbody>\n                                                                            <tr>\n                                                                                <td style=\"width: 100%;\">\n                                                                                    <div style=\"height: 16px; line-height: 16px; font-size: 1px;\">\n                                                                                        &nbsp;\n                                                                                    </div>\n                                                                                </td>\n                                                                            </tr>\n                                                                            </tbody>\n                                                                        </table>\n                                                                        <ul style=\"padding-left: 14px; margin: 0px;\">\n                                                                            <li style=\"margin-left: 0px;\"><p>This timed entry reservation is valid for the day and entry time indicated on the ticket, with an allowance for a 30-minute early arrival. Once entered, visitors can stay the entire duration of the day that the Scenic Drive is open to the public. Reservations are required October 1 to May 31, 8 am- 5 pm. </p>\n<p>Re-entry into the Scenic Drive after your one-hour entry reservation will require a new reservation. </p>\n\n                                                                            </li>\n                                                                        </ul>\n                                                                        <table\n                                                                                border=\"0\"\n                                                                                cellpadding=\"0\"\n                                                                                cellspacing=\"0\"\n                                                                                role=\"presentation\"\n                                                                                style=\"width: 100%;\"\n                                                                        >\n                                                                            <tbody>\n                                                                            <tr>\n                                                                                <td style=\"width: 100%;\">\n                                                                                    <div style=\"height: 16px; line-height: 16px; font-size: 1px;\">\n                                                                                        &nbsp;\n                                                                                    </div>\n                                                                                </td>\n                                                                            </tr>\n                                                                            </tbody>\n                                                                        </table>\n                                                                        \n                                                                        <h3 style=\"margin: 0px;\">Entering the Conservation Area</h3>\n                                                                        <table\n                                                                                border=\"0\"\n                                                                                cellpadding=\"0\"\n                                                                                cellspacing=\"0\"\n                                                                                role=\"presentation\"\n                                                                                style=\"width: 100%;\"\n                                                                        >\n                                                                            <tbody>\n                                                                            <tr>\n                                                                                <td style=\"width: 100%;\">\n                                                                                    <div style=\"height: 16px; line-height: 16px; font-size: 1px;\">\n                                                                                        &nbsp;\n                                                                                    </div>\n                                                                                </td>\n                                                                            </tr>\n                                                                            </tbody>\n                                                                        </table>\n                                                                        <ul style=\"padding-left: 14px; margin: 0px;\">\n                                                                            <li style=\"margin-left: 0px;\"><p>Please have a printed or digital copy of your reservation ticket available to be scanned BEFORE arriving at the entrance station. Current Pass holders must provide Pass for validation.</p>\n\n                                                                            </li>\n                                                                        </ul>\n                                                                        <table\n                                                                                border=\"0\"\n                                                                                cellpadding=\"0\"\n                                                                                cellspacing=\"0\"\n                                                                                role=\"presentation\"\n                                                                                style=\"width: 100%;\"\n                                                                        >\n                                                                            <tbody>\n                                                                            <tr>\n                                                                                <td style=\"width: 100%;\">\n                                                                                    <div style=\"height: 16px; line-height: 16px; font-size: 1px;\">\n                                                                                        &nbsp;\n                                                                                    </div>\n                                                                                </td>\n                                                                            </tr>\n                                                                            </tbody>\n                                                                        </table>\n                                                                        \n                                                                        <h3 style=\"margin: 0px;\">Hours of Operations</h3>\n                                                                        <table\n                                                                                border=\"0\"\n                                                                                cellpadding=\"0\"\n                                                                                cellspacing=\"0\"\n                                                                                role=\"presentation\"\n                                                                                style=\"width: 100%;\"\n                                                                        >\n                                                                            <tbody>\n                                                                            <tr>\n                                                                                <td style=\"width: 100%;\">\n                                                                                    <div style=\"height: 16px;   "scrubbed_text": "is confirmed for Scenic Drive 1-Day Personal Vehicle Entry at Red Rock Canyon Scenic Drive Timed Entry and provides\nPlease have a printed or digital copy of your reservation ticket available to be scanned BEFORE arriving at the entrance station. Current Pass holders must provide Pass for validation.\nYour Reservation Details!\nView/Print Reservation\nHello Dan,\nAdventure awaits! Your reservation 0888904006-1\nimportant details for\nyour upcoming trip.\nReservation Details\nScenic Drive 1-Day Personal Vehicle Entry\nRed Rock Canyon Scenic Drive Timed Entry\nBe sure to have your\nID and tickets\nwith the QR code ready upon\narrival, either printed or\ndigitally on your phone.\nWe\nrecommend taking\na screenshot of\nyour ticket prior to\narrival,\nin case there is limited\ncell service at the\nlocation.\nMarch 27, 2026\nStart\nTime: 10:00 AM\nEnd\nTime: 11:00 AM\nTickets:\nPersonal Vehicle: 1\nModify Ticket\n* Subject to\navailability\nThis code serves as your\ndigital ticket\nPrint Ticket\nNeed to cancel\nyour reservation?\nCancel Reservation\nCancellation / Refund Policies\nThis location needs you to know\nView Facility Details\nTimed Entry\nThis timed entry reservation is valid for the day and entry time indicated on the ticket, with an allowance for a 30-minute early arrival. Once entered, visitors can stay the entire duration of the day that the Scenic Drive is open to the public. Reservations are required October 1 to May 31, 8 am- 5 pm.\nRe-entry into the Scenic Drive after your one-hour entry reservation will require a new reservation.\nEntering the Conservation Area\nHours of Operations\nOctober: 6 am to 7 pm PST | November February: 6 am to 5 pm PST | March: 6 am to 7 pm PST | April- September: 6 am to 8 pm PST\nFee Free Day Tickets\nRed Rock Canyon National Conservation Area participates in entrance fee-free days. On these significant days of celebration or commemoration, all entrance fees are waived. To reserve a ticket for a Fee Free day, select Scenic Drive 1-Day Personal Vehicle Fee Free Day or Scenic Drive 1-Day RV/Trailer Fee Free Entry. Fee Free days are as follows:\n2022 Fee Free Days\nNovember 11 (Veterans Day)\n2023 Fee Free Days\nJanuary 16 (Martin Luther King Jr. Day)\nFebruary 20 (Presidents Day)\nJune 10 (National Get Outdoors Day)\nAugust 4 (Great American Outdoors Day)\nSeptember 30 (National Public Lands Day)\nDirections\nRed Rock Canyon is located 17 miles west of the Las Vegas Strip on Charleston Boulevard/State Route 159. The Scenic Drive and Visitor Center is located 5 miles east of the Conservation Area Boundary. The Visitor Center is located at 1000 Scenic Loop Drive and can be used for map apps that will take you to the Visitor Center near the beginning of the Scenic Drive.\nHelp & Support\nHave a question - were\nhere to\nhelp! For information about your account, reservations, trip planner, and more,\nthe best\nplace to start is our Help Center. If you need additional support, you can submit an email, chat\nwith a\nrepresentative, or find other contact options on our Contact Us page.\nYou have received\nthis email\nbecause youre a valued Rec.gov visitor.\nIf you no longer wish to receive\nthese emails\nyou can unsubscribe at any time.\n© 2022\nRecreation.gov. All\nRights Reserved.",

    "scrubbed_text": "is confirmed for Scenic Drive 1-Day Personal Vehicle Entry at Red Rock Canyon Scenic Drive Timed Entry and provides\nPlease have a printed or digital copy of your reservation ticket available to be scanned BEFORE arriving at the entrance station. Current Pass holders must provide Pass for validation.\nYour Reservation Details!\nView/Print Reservation\nHello Dan,\nAdventure awaits! Your reservation 0888904006-1\nimportant details for\nyour upcoming trip.\nReservation Details\nScenic Drive 1-Day Personal Vehicle Entry\nRed Rock Canyon Scenic Drive Timed Entry\nBe sure to have your\nID and tickets\nwith the QR code ready upon\narrival, either printed or\ndigitally on your phone.\nWe\nrecommend taking\na screenshot of\nyour ticket prior to\narrival,\nin case there is limited\ncell service at the\nlocation.\nMarch 27, 2026\nStart\nTime: 10:00 AM\nEnd\nTime: 11:00 AM\nTickets:\nPersonal Vehicle: 1\nModify Ticket\n* Subject to\navailability\nThis code serves as your\ndigital ticket\nPrint Ticket\nNeed to cancel\nyour reservation?\nCancel Reservation\nCancellation / Refund Policies\nThis location needs you to know\nView Facility Details\nTimed Entry\nThis timed entry reservation is valid for the day and entry time indicated on the ticket, with an allowance for a 30-minute early arrival. Once entered, visitors can stay the entire duration of the day that the Scenic Drive is open to the public. Reservations are required October 1 to May 31, 8 am- 5 pm.\nRe-entry into the Scenic Drive after your one-hour entry reservation will require a new reservation.\nEntering the Conservation Area\nHours of Operations\nOctober: 6 am to 7 pm PST | November February: 6 am to 5 pm PST | March: 6 am to 7 pm PST | April- September: 6 am to 8 pm PST\nFee Free Day Tickets\nRed Rock Canyon National Conservation Area participates in entrance fee-free days. On these significant days of celebration or commemoration, all entrance fees are waived. To reserve a ticket for a Fee Free day, select Scenic Drive 1-Day Personal Vehicle Fee Free Day or Scenic Drive 1-Day RV/Trailer Fee Free Entry. Fee Free days are as follows:\n2022 Fee Free Days\nNovember 11 (Veterans Day)\n2023 Fee Free Days\nJanuary 16 (Martin Luther King Jr. Day)\nFebruary 20 (Presidents Day)\nJune 10 (National Get Outdoors Day)\nAugust 4 (Great American Outdoors Day)\nSeptember 30 (National Public Lands Day)\nDirections\nRed Rock Canyon is located 17 miles west of the Las Vegas Strip on Charleston Boulevard/State Route 159. The Scenic Drive and Visitor Center is located 5 miles east of the Conservation Area Boundary. The Visitor Center is located at 1000 Scenic Loop Drive and can be used for map apps that will take you to the Visitor Center near the beginning of the Scenic Drive.\nHelp & Support\nHave a question - were\nhere to\nhelp! For information about your account, reservations, trip planner, and more,\nthe best\nplace to start is our Help Center. If you need additional support, you can submit an email, chat\nwith a\nrepresentative, or find other contact options on our Contact Us page.\nYou have received\nthis email\nbecause youre a valued Rec.gov visitor.\nIf you no longer wish to receive\nthese emails\nyou can unsubscribe at any time.\n© 2022\nRecreation.gov. All\nRights Reserved.",

      "scrubbed_text": "is confirmed for Scenic Drive 1-Day Personal Vehicle Entry at Red Rock Canyon Scenic Drive Timed Entry and provides\nPlease have a printed or digital copy of your reservation ticket available to be scanned BEFORE arriving at the entrance station. Current Pass holders must provide Pass for validation.\nYour Reservation Details!\nView/Print Reservation\nHello Dan,\nAdventure awaits! Your reservation 0888904006-1\nimportant details for\nyour upcoming trip.\nReservation Details\nScenic Drive 1-Day Personal Vehicle Entry\nRed Rock Canyon Scenic Drive Timed Entry\nBe sure to have your\nID and tickets\nwith the QR code ready upon\narrival, either printed or\ndigitally on your phone.\nWe\nrecommend taking\na screenshot of\nyour ticket prior to\narrival,\nin case there is limited\ncell service at the\nlocation.\nMarch 27, 2026\nStart\nTime: 10:00 AM\nEnd\nTime: 11:00 AM\nTickets:\nPersonal Vehicle: 1\nModify Ticket\n* Subject to\navailability\nThis code serves as your\ndigital ticket\nPrint Ticket\nNeed to cancel\nyour reservation?\nCancel Reservation\nCancellation / Refund Policies\nThis location needs you to know\nView Facility Details\nTimed Entry\nThis timed entry reservation is valid for the day and entry time indicated on the ticket, with an allowance for a 30-minute early arrival. Once entered, visitors can stay the entire duration of the day that the Scenic Drive is open to the public. Reservations are required October 1 to May 31, 8 am- 5 pm.\nRe-entry into the Scenic Drive after your one-hour entry reservation will require a new reservation.\nEntering the Conservation Area\nHours of Operations\nOctober: 6 am to 7 pm PST | November February: 6 am to 5 pm PST | March: 6 am to 7 pm PST | April- September: 6 am to 8 pm PST\nFee Free Day Tickets\nRed Rock Canyon National Conservation Area participates in entrance fee-free days. On these significant days of celebration or commemoration, all entrance fees are waived. To reserve a ticket for a Fee Free day, select Scenic Drive 1-Day Personal Vehicle Fee Free Day or Scenic Drive 1-Day RV/Trailer Fee Free Entry. Fee Free days are as follows:\n2022 Fee Free Days\nNovember 11 (Veterans Day)\n2023 Fee Free Days\nJanuary 16 (Martin Luther King Jr. Day)\nFebruary 20 (Presidents Day)\nJune 10 (National Get Outdoors Day)\nAugust 4 (Great American Outdoors Day)\nSeptember 30 (National Public Lands Day)\nDirections\nRed Rock Canyon is located 17 miles west of the Las Vegas Strip on Charleston Boulevard/State Route 159. The Scenic Drive and Visitor Center is located 5 miles east of the Conservation Area Boundary. The Visitor Center is located at 1000 Scenic Loop Drive and can be used for map apps that will take you to the Visitor Center near the beginning of the Scenic Drive.\nHelp & Support\nHave a question - were\nhere to\nhelp! For information about your account, reservations, trip planner, and more,\nthe best\nplace to start is our Help Center. If you need additional support, you can submit an email, chat\nwith a\nrepresentative, or find other contact options on our Contact Us page.\nYou have received\nthis email\nbecause youre a valued Rec.gov visitor.\nIf you no longer wish to receive\nthese emails\nyou can unsubscribe at any time.\n© 2022\nRecreation.gov. All\nRights Reserved.",

    "subject": "Recreation.gov Reservation Confirmation",
    "scrubbed_text": "is confirmed for Scenic Drive 1-Day Personal Vehicle Entry at Red Rock Canyon Scenic Drive Timed Entry and provides\nPlease have a printed or digital copy of your reservation ticket available to be scanned BEFORE arriving at the entrance station. Current Pass holders must provide Pass for validation.\nYour Reservation Details!\nView/Print Reservation\nHello Dan,\nAdventure awaits! Your reservation 0888904006-1\nimportant details for\nyour upcoming trip.\nReservation Details\nScenic Drive 1-Day Personal Vehicle Entry\nRed Rock Canyon Scenic Drive Timed Entry\nBe sure to have your\nID and tickets\nwith the QR code ready upon\narrival, either printed or\ndigitally on your phone.\nWe\nrecommend taking\na screenshot of\nyour ticket prior to\narrival,\nin case there is limited\ncell service at the\nlocation.\nMarch 27, 2026\nStart\nTime: 10:00 AM\nEnd\nTime: 11:00 AM\nTickets:\nPersonal Vehicle: 1\nModify Ticket\n* Subject to\navailability\nThis code serves as your\ndigital ticket\nPrint Ticket\nNeed to cancel\nyour reservation?\nCancel Reservation\nCancellation / Refund Policies\nThis location needs you to know\nView Facility Details\nTimed Entry\nThis timed entry reservation is valid for the day and entry time indicated on the ticket, with an allowance for a 30-minute early arrival. Once entered, visitors can stay the entire duration of the day that the Scenic Drive is open to the public. Reservations are required October 1 to May 31, 8 am- 5 pm.\nRe-entry into the Scenic Drive after your one-hour entry reservation will require a new reservation.\nEntering the Conservation Area\nHours of Operations\nOctober: 6 am to 7 pm PST | November February: 6 am to 5 pm PST | March: 6 am to 7 pm PST | April- September: 6 am to 8 pm PST\nFee Free Day Tickets\nRed Rock Canyon National Conservation Area participates in entrance fee-free days. On these significant days of celebration or commemoration, all entrance fees are waived. To reserve a ticket for a Fee Free day, select Scenic Drive 1-Day Personal Vehicle Fee Free Day or Scenic Drive 1-Day RV/Trailer Fee Free Entry. Fee Free days are as follows:\n2022 Fee Free Days\nNovember 11 (Veterans Day)\n2023 Fee Free Days\nJanuary 16 (Martin Luther King Jr. Day)\nFebruary 20 (Presidents Day)\nJune 10 (National Get Outdoors Day)\nAugust 4 (Great American Outdoors Day)\nSeptember 30 (National Public Lands Day)\nDirections\nRed Rock Canyon is located 17 miles west of the Las Vegas Strip on Charleston Boulevard/State Route 159. The Scenic Drive and Visitor Center is located 5 miles east of the Conservation Area Boundary. The Visitor Center is located at 1000 Scenic Loop Drive and can be used for map apps that will take you to the Visitor Center near the beginning of the Scenic Drive.\nHelp & Support\nHave a question - were\nhere to\nhelp! For information about your account, reservations, trip planner, and more,\nthe best\nplace to start is our Help Center. If you need additional support, you can submit an email, chat\nwith a\nrepresentative, or find other contact options on our Contact Us page.\nYou have received\nthis email\nbecause youre a valued Rec.gov visitor.\nIf you no longer wish to receive\nthese emails\nyou can unsubscribe at any time.\n© 2022\nRecreation.gov. All\nRights Reserved.",
